response.justification: Sarah has strong technical depth across multiple languages and domains, with clear experience in testing infrastructure, CI/CD, and developer tooling — aligning well with engineering productivity goals. However, her resume lacks explicit evidence of people management, team leadership, or organizational change initiatives, and her title history does not reflect formal managerial roles despite 8+ years of engineering experience.
strengths: Extensive hands-on experience building developer tools, test runners, and CI/CD infrastructure
Proven track record in open-source tooling and technical education (workshops, courses, libraries)
Broad technical stack across mobile, web, and embedded systems with cross-platform expertise
concerns: No clear evidence of formal people management or team leadership experience
Titles and responsibilities lack alignment with managerial duties (e.g., 1:1s, roadmap ownership, performance feedback)
Limited indication of mobile platform experience or build system optimization at scale
